name: @ever-works/secret-store-doppler-plugin
description: Doppler SecretStoreResolver plugin for Ever Works — resolves doppler:<project>/<config> pointers via the Doppler REST API. Freemium SaaS secrets-management platform.

plugin.name: Doppler Secret Store
plugin.description: Resolves doppler:<project>/<config> pointers via the Doppler REST API. Fetches all secrets in the named config and returns them as a flat credential bag (prefers .raw, falls back to .computed).

envVars.name: DOPPLER_TOKEN
envVars.description: Doppler Service Token or Service Account token with read access to the project/config.
